hero.tagline: I’m a full-stack software engineer who builds end-to-end solutions—from backend services to desktop apps and operations tooling.
about_paragraphs: I’m currently the sole developer at An Giang Ferry JSC, building a ticketing/validation system, internal management tools, and a self-managed server setup for day-to-day operations.

My strength is adapting quickly to different environments and project needs. I’ve self-learned and shipped across web, low-code platforms, applications, embedded/chip systems, and servers to meet real customer requirements.

items.date: Apr 2024 - Jun 2024, Ho Chi Minh City
items.desc:
Goal: build a WordPress website for service promotion and a Telegram chatbot to support customers.
Tech: WordPress, Python, JavaScript, Cloudflare Worker, PHP

Goal: build a prototype for an AI-enabled dashboard.
Tech: Noloco, Airtable, Zoho Analytics

An Giang Ferry JSC (AGF)
items.desc:

items.value: Go, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, PHP, Python

desc.goal: Build a WordPress website to promote iCloud support services and provide product-ID lookup from an existing dataset.
desc.role: Freelance developer responsible for end-to-end delivery.

job.summary: Designed and implemented a WordPress platform plus automation to support service operations.
sub_jobs: Built a product-ID lookup website with a user-friendly interface.
Developed custom plugins/features in PHP based on client requirements.
Advised on hosting configuration to optimize cost and stability.
Built a Telegram chatbot using Cloudflare Worker to support customers.

result: Website delivered and met customer needs.
Telegram chatbot reached 1,500 interactions in 2 weeks.
desc.tech: WordPress, PHP, Telegram Bot API, JavaScript, Cloudflare Worker

desc.goal: Build a dashboard prototype with AI support for performance analysis, CRM, and insight reporting.
desc.role: Application developer, also supporting scope coordination in a PM-style role.

job.summary: Researched low-code solutions and built a demo aligned with business goals.
sub_jobs: Compared low-code platforms by delivery speed and scalability.
Designed data flows connecting Airtable, Noloco, and Zoho Analytics.
Built core demo features for live stakeholder walkthroughs.
Clarified requirements per sprint to reduce scope-change risk.

result: Prototype met customer needs and supported product direction decisions.
Delivered complete technical documentation for the next development phase.

items.name: Ticketing & Ferry Operations Platform
items.meta: An Giang Ferry JSC, Oct 2025 - Present

desc.goal: Build a ticketing and operations system for 7 ferry stations (~60 users) with high daily transaction volume.
desc.role: Sole developer owning the full product lifecycle from design to operations.

job.summary: Delivered a ticketing/validation platform and self-managed server infrastructure optimized for operations.
sub_jobs: Built ticketing web flows integrated with custom NanoPi Neo chip software for ticket validation.
Implemented a primary server and a backup server for the system.
Built internal management and reporting dashboards.
Optimized performance, operating cost, and reduced internet dependency.

result: Reduced ticket validation time from ~3 seconds to 0.5–1 second.
Significantly reduced third-party dependency costs for ticketing and server maintenance.
Improved usability and installation experience for non-technical operators.
desc.tech: Go, SQLite, REST APIs, JWT Auth, Vanilla JS, Windows scripting (.bat/PowerShell), embedded Linux (NanoPi)
